series_metadata.series_title: Offender Workforce Development Videoconference Schedules and Resumes
series_metadata.series_description: Packeted information regarding each scheduled Offender Workforce Development Videoconference. Includes institutional schedule, submitted resumes and detail sheets (electronic form).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain 2 years. ; Electronic: Maintain electronic records 2 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
